assignments.title: ABC391E Hierarchical Majority Vote
assignments.reason: 递归分治每层多数投票，并用 DP 计算翻转根值的最小修改数

assignments.title: ABC391F K-th Largest Triplet
assignments.reason: 二分答案并统计不少于阈值的三元组数量

assignments.title: ABC391G Many LCS
assignments.reason: 围绕最长公共子序列长度做二维 DP 计数

assignments.title: ABC392A Shuffled Equation
assignments.reason: 检查三数重排后是否存在两数乘积等于第三数

assignments.title: ABC392B Who is Missing?
assignments.reason: 桶计数标记出现过的数字，再顺序输出缺失项

assignments.title: ABC392C Bib
assignments.reason: 用数组记录号码牌位置与指向关系，按下标映射输出答案

assignments.title: ABC392D Doubles
assignments.reason: 用 map 统计骰子各点数频率并枚举两个骰子的相同点概率

assignments.title: ABC392E Cables and Servers
assignments.reason: 并查集维护连通块并重连冗余边，使整图连通

assignments.title: ABC392F Insert
assignments.reason: 线段树维护空位，按第 P_i 个位置插入元素

assignments.title: ABC392G Fine Triplets
assignments.reason: 利用计数数组与前缀和统计等差三元组个数

assignments.title: ABC393A Poisonous Oyster
assignments.reason: 根据 sick 或 fine 的组合做分类讨论

assignments.title: ABC393B A..B..C
assignments.reason: 枚举中心和间距，检查等距位置是否为 A B C

assignments.title: ABC393C Make it Simple
assignments.reason: 用 set 统计无向边，去除自环和重边即可

assignments.title: ABC393D Swap to Gather
assignments.reason: 抽取 1 的位置后用前缀和求移到连续段的最小交换次数

assignments.title: ABC393E GCD of Subset
assignments.reason: 按公约数倍数计数并结合容斥求每个元素可达到的最大 GCD

assignments.title: ABC393F Prefix LIS Query
assignments.reason: 离线处理查询，用线段树维护前缀值域上的 LIS 最优值

assignments.title: ABC393G Unevenness
assignments.reason: 把网格调节转化为最小割或网络流建模求最优

assignments.title: ABC394A 22222
assignments.reason: 遍历字符串并筛出所有字符 2

assignments.title: ABC394B cat
assignments.reason: 按字符串长度排序后依次拼接

assignments.title: ABC394C Debug
assignments.reason: 顺序扫描并按栈式消解规则把最左侧 WA 替换为 AC

assignments.title: ABC394D Colorful Bracket Sequence
assignments.reason: 用栈匹配三种括号，判断是否为合法括号序列

assignments.title: ABC394E Palindromic Shortest Path
assignments.reason: 在点对状态图上 BFS，扩展两端相同字符求最短回文路

assignments.title: ABC394F Alkane
assignments.reason: 树形 DP 选择满足度数为 1 或 4 的最大子树

assignments.title: ABC394G Dense Buildings
assignments.reason: 带楼层状态的图最短路，使用优先队列求最少楼梯代价

assignments.title: ABC395A Strictly Increasing?
assignments.reason: 顺序遍历数组并检查是否始终严格递增

assignments.title: ABC395B Make Target
assignments.reason: 二维数组按同心方框逐层覆盖输出最终图案

assignments.title: ABC395C Shortest Duplicate Subarray
assignments.reason: 双指针或哈希记录最近位置，求最短含重复值子数组

assignments.title: ABC395D Pigeon Swap
assignments.reason: 用映射维护鸽子和巢穴关系，高效处理整体交换与查询

assignments.title: ABC395E Flip Edge
assignments.reason: 分层建图表示当前边方向状态，用最短路求最小总代价

assignments.title: ABC395F Smooth Occlusion
assignments.reason: 二分公共高度并用单调队列优化 DP 计算最小磨牙成本
